_about: SYNTHETIC telecom GL (NOT real data) — carries ONLY the lease-liabilities maturity-split note, to exercise the G5 'confirm split' gate. The TB lumps the lease liability into a single non-current leaf (tc_lease_liab_nc = 6,000) and does NOT carry an independent current half, so the split is Case B: a MANAGEMENT JUDGMENT with no independent TB backstop. `lines` carry each movement line's label + amount + its KNOWN maturity (the demo's stand-in for the live maturity proposer's answer); the GUI calls the REAL propose_maturity_split on the labels to produce the classification, then the engine splits the amounts deterministically. The other declared telecom notes (PP&E, intangibles, right-of-use roll-forwards) are given NO GL here, so they render honestly as 'not generated' — never faked. note_total (6,000) ties to the lease TB line.

lines.label: Lease liabilities — payable after more than twelve months
Lease liabilities — current portion due within twelve months
